figures.caption: Fig. 1. Overview of CuraLight. RL agent assists GPT in exploring urban networks and collecting interaction trajectories for LoRA-based imitation fine-tuning of the CuraLight LLM agent. An RL-based selector and a multi-LLM ensemble deliberation system then evaluate and rank candidate signal-timing actions, providing prioritized supervision for scenario interaction data collection, filtering, and adapter training.

Fig. 4. Training Pipeline of CuraLight with RL Top-K Filtering and MultiLLM Deliberation
Fig. 3. Overview of the Diffusion-Based RL Assistant with Pressure-Based Phase Selection

TABLE I RESULTS ON JINAN (JN-1/2/3) AND HANGZHOU (HZ-1/2) ACROSS THREE METRICS. ALL VALUES ARE ROUNDED TO TWO DECIMAL PLACES. THE BEST RESULTS ARE IN BOLD, THE SECOND-BEST ARE UNDERLINED, AND THE THIRD-BEST ARE DOUBLE UNDERLINED.
